personal.name: Ali Hamza Khan
personal.tagline: Flutter Mobile App Developer based in Karachi, Pakistan. I specialize in building high-performance cross-platform applications for Android, iOS, and Flutter Web with modern UI/UX, scalable architecture, and seamless user experiences.

expertise.title: Flutter App Development
expertise.description: Building high-performance cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter for Android and iOS with clean architecture, responsive UI, and scalable codebases.

expertise.title: Flutter Web Development
expertise.description: Developing modern Flutter Web applications with responsive layouts, real-time integrations, and optimized performance for desktop and mobile browsers.

expertise.title: Backend & API Integration
expertise.description: Integrating REST APIs, Firebase, authentication systems, payment gateways, maps, and real-time databases to create production-ready digital products.

experience.title: Senior Flutter Developer
experience.description: Working as a freelance Flutter developer delivering scalable mobile and web applications for startups, agencies, and businesses worldwide. Built advanced solutions including healthcare systems, logistics platforms, AI-powered applications, real-time tracking systems, inventory management software, and delivery ecosystems. Specialized in high-performance Flutter architecture, Firebase backend systems, REST APIs, payment gateway integrations, Google Maps, and AI integrations.

experience.title: Flutter Developer
experience.description: Currently working in a reputable software house developing enterprise-grade mobile applications and scalable business solutions. Responsible for application architecture, API integrations, state management, optimization, production deployments, and implementing modern UI/UX experiences across Android and iOS platforms.

experience.title: Independent Product Developer
experience.description: Designed and launched personal applications and SaaS-based products targeting real-world market problems including delivery management, health systems, tracking platforms, and AI-powered business tools. Focused on building scalable digital products with modern technologies, monetization models, and user-centric experiences.

education.description: Completed specialized training in Android application development, focusing on mobile app fundamentals, UI development, and application lifecycle management.
Studied core pre-engineering subjects with strong foundation in mathematics, physics, and analytical problem solving.

projects.title: Smart Optimizing Delivery System (SODS)
projects.description: An end-to-end logistics and delivery management platform handling 10,000+ daily deliveries across multiple cities with real-time tracking, route optimization, offline-first driver support, Firebase backend, and subscription-based payment management.

projects.title: AI-Powered Health Application
projects.description: A health monitoring application featuring AI-powered health recommendations, workout tracking, AI chatbot support, encrypted health data management, HIPAA-compliant authentication, and real-time synchronization across devices.

projects.title: Route Optimization System for Riders
projects.description: An intelligent rider route optimization system reducing delivery times by 25% with Google Maps API optimization, real-time location tracking, Firebase Cloud Messaging, and scalable REST API integrations.

projects.title: PigyBak
projects.description: A service and job marketplace application where users can find nearby contractors, skilled professionals, and local services with secure payment integration, real-time job workflows, user authentication, and service management features.

projects.title: Crescent Tracking
projects.description: A real-time GPS tracking platform with live vehicle tracking, geofencing, location history visualization, and advanced map-based analytics.

projects.title: Green Sukkur
projects.description: An e-commerce platform built with Flutter and Firebase featuring secure checkout, product catalog management, responsive UI, and scalable backend services.

projects.title: Augmented Reality Food App
projects.description: An augmented reality food application enabling users to visualize menu items in real-world environments using camera integration and OpenGL rendering.

testimonials.quote: "Ali delivered an exceptional Flutter application with smooth performance on both Android and iOS. His understanding of scalable architecture and UI/UX is outstanding."
testimonials.name: Ahmed Raza

testimonials.quote: "Working with Ali was seamless. He built our Flutter Web and mobile ecosystem with clean code, real-time integrations, and excellent communication throughout the project."
testimonials.name: Sarah Khan
